data.title: PrairieSky Announces Results of the Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On April 20, 2026, PrairieSky Royalty Ltd, traded as PSK on the TSX, successfully conducted its annual general meeting in Calgary, Alberta. All resolutions presented at the meeting were approved by the shareholders.

data.title: NVIDIA unveils memory optimization for Jetson, freeing up 12GB for 10B parameter AI models on edge devices.
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled new optimization techniques that can free up to 12GB of memory on Jetson devices. This enables the smooth running of multi-billion parameter Large Language Models (LLMs) on edge hardware. This advancement in optimization allows for more efficient operation of these powerful models on the edge, making them more accessible and practical for a wider range of applications.

data.title: New NVIDIA NeMo RL training method achieves 48% speedup using End-to-End FP8 precision, reducing infrastructure costs.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced a new FP8 formula for reinforcement learning that leads to a 48% increase in training speed compared to previous methods, while maintaining the same accuracy level as BF16. This innovation offers a substantial reduction in AI infrastructure expenses.
Asia-Pacific stocks rise as geopolitical sentiment stabilizes, driven by expectations though still uncertain of renewed US-Iran negotiations in Islamabad.

data.title: Inland Empire Health Plan ranks in 100th percentile on provider satisfaction survey
data.description: In Rancho Cucamonga, California, on April 20, 2026, the Inland Empire Health Plan (IEHP), ranked among the top five largest Medicaid health plans in the United States, has secured a perfect score in overall satisfaction on Press Ganey's Provider Experience Survey, placing them at the 100th percentile nationally. This achievement is a significant milestone for IEHP, highlighting their commitment to excellence in healthcare delivery.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig's Jane McLaughlin Selected for City & State's 2026 'Who's Who in Energy' List
data.description: In Albany, New York, on April 20, 2026, Jane E. McLaughlin, a member of global law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP's Albany office, has been recognized in the 2026 City & State "Who's Who in Energy" list. This prestigious distinction showcases influential individuals involved in the energy sector.
